column1: # Speaker name alias table — loaded by utils/aliases.py as RAW_ALIASES.
# Maps raw PDF speaker strings (exactly as they appear after the colon in
# transcripts) to their normalized canonical form. These are applied
# BEFORE the phonetic deduplication algorithm runs, so it handles
# the hard cases the algorithm cannot catch on its own (OCR errors, missing
# - category is a human-assigned label describing why the alias exists
#   (e.g. OCR error, spacing, typo). It is documentation only — the loader
# - Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored.
# - Match is exact and case-sensitive against the raw PDF string.
